task_completion.description: draw.io is opened and used to create a diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io (diagrams.net) application window is visible on the screen with a canvas.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the System Context diagram with 8 elements and labeled relationships.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagram page showing a central 'WordPress CMS' system interacting with 3 Persons (Reader, Author, Admin) and 4 External Systems (Email, CDN, Social Media, Plugin Repo). The connections between them must have text labels.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the Container diagram with internal components inside a System Boundary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second diagram page showing a System Boundary box containing internal components (like Web Server, PHP App, Database, etc.), surrounded by the external actors from Page 1. Connections must have text labels.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as wordpress_c4.drawio on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An icon for 'wordpress_c4.drawio' is visible on the Desktop, or the save dialog/file manager confirms this file exists in the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as wordpress_c4.png on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file icon for 'wordpress_c4.png' is visible on the Desktop, or the export dialog/file manager confirms this file exists in the Desktop directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the draw.io interface, dragging shapes, typing text, and drawing lines.

integrity.description: The diagram uses actual shapes and connectors, not just plain text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements in the diagram are enclosed in distinct shapes (rectangles, person icons, etc.) connected by drawn lines/arrows, consistent with C4 notation.

integrity.description: The PNG file was exported from draw.io.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the File -> Export as -> PNG menu option in draw.io, rather than downloading an external image or renaming a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The System Context view (Page 1) must include 8 shapes: 3 Persons (Reader, Author, Admin), 1 System (WordPress CMS), and 4 External Systems (Email, CDN, Social Media, Plugin Repository), with at least 7 labeled relationships. The Container view (Page 2) must include a System Boundary containing 7 internal components (Web Server/Apache/Nginx, PHP App/wp-includes, WP-Admin, REST API, Database/MySQL, Media Storage/wp-content/uploads, WP-Cron), with at least 8 labeled relationships. Total minimum shapes: 16. Total minimum edges: 15.
